# costory_metrics_datasource_s3_parquet (Resource)

Creates a Costory AwsS3V2 metrics datasource for parquet files in S3.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket_name` (String) S3 bucket name containing parquet files.
- `metrics_definition` (Attributes List) List of metric definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metrics_definition))
- `name` (String) Display name of the datasource.
- `role_arn` (String) IAM role ARN (must match `arn:aws:iam::`).

### Optional

- `prefix` (String) S3 key prefix for parquet files.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Datasource ID returned by Costory.
- `status` (String) Datasource status returned by Costory.
- `type` (String) Datasource type. Always `AwsS3V2` for this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--metrics_definition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metrics_definition`

Required:

- `aggregation` (String) One of: `SUM`, `Average`.
- `date_column` (String) Parquet column containing dates.
- `gap_filling` (String) One of: `ZERO`, `FORWARD_FILL`, `LINEAR_INTERPOLATION`, `SPREAD`.
- `metric_name` (String) Pretty name of the metric.
- `value_column` (String) Parquet column containing metric values.

Optional:

- `dimensions` (List of String) Parquet columns used as dimensional axes.
- `unit` (String) Unit label for the metric.
